summary: Krea2-as-editor test spike. Main goal: instruct-edit via conradlocke/krea2-identity-edit + lbouaraba/comfyui-krea2edit. Fallback: test Krea2 Raw if Turbo cfg 1.0 starves edit conditioning. First concrete reason to build Raw.
Krea2-as-editor spike shipping: 4-card tier set (High=Raw/edit, Balanced=Turbo), generator 4-variant, edit LoRA + Raw transformers wired, R2 uploads in flight.
Local-verified: t2i + masked identity-edit work (crop/stitch, no seam, dep auto-install). Style LoRAs + Force-1024 reverted. FINAL gate: RunPod remote-engine verification deferred to 2026-07-17.

note: Added MPI-316 re-verify scope: edit now runs Raw + accelerator LoRA (new dep, backslash path on Linux Pod), a 3-step second pass, and a runtime-injected Input_Tier. MPI-316 closed on local evidence only.

doing -> done (complete). RunPod remote pass on RTX 2000 (MPI-324 sweep). Krea2 exercised end-to-end remotely: t2i, i2i, depth (poseReference), upscale, masked identity edit, AND 2-character edit - all clean, no color seam, no degrade. Accel LoRA (krea2_turbo_distill_r128) resolved (a silent miss would have degraded output; outputs clean). Turbo two-pass survived the remote path. Step count result-verified, not console-counted. Backslash subfolder LoRA path worked on Linux Pod.
